homepage.headline: Glam Lounge Luxury Salon
homepage.punchline: Best Bridal Makeup Artist in Panipat
homepage.aboutText: Glam Lounge Luxury Salon is Model Town's premier unisex destination for high-end makeup, professional hair styling, and rejuvenating skin care. Founded by master artist Gul Arora, our salon combines international artistry standards learned in Canada and Singapore with a luxurious, relaxing atmosphere. We are dedicated to bringing out your unique beauty and confidence for every special occasion.

gulArora.name: Gul Arora
gulArora.title: Founder & Lead Makeup Artist
gulArora.bio: Gul Arora is an HD bridal and party makeup specialist who has graduated from prestigious beauty academies in Canada and Singapore. Known for her flawless techniques and customized approach, He believes that every client has a unique story that can be highlighted beautifully through professional makeup artistry.
credentials: Certified HD Makeup Artist — Canada Academy
Over 8+ Years of Premium Styling Experience

team.name: Akash
team.description: Noted for exceptional hair cutting, custom coloring, and modern styling techniques that elevate your everyday look.

categories.name: Makeup Services
categories.description: Specializing in professional artistry for weddings and events, known for customized and flawless finishes.

services.name: Bridal Makeup
services.description: A signature service designed for brides, including traditional and contemporary looks tailored to individual features.

services.name: Airbrush Makeup
services.description: Long-lasting, water-resistant, high-definition finish using a fine mist technique.

services.name: Party & Fashion Makeup
services.description: Professional styling for social gatherings or photo shoots to ensure a camera-ready glow.

services.name: Makeup Academy
services.description: Professional training courses for aspiring artists to master advanced makeup techniques.

categories.name: Hair Care & Styling
categories.description: A variety of hair treatments and styling options for both men and women.

services.name: Hair Cut (Women)
services.description: Precision cutting and styling to enhance hair texture and shape.

services.name: Hair Smoothening
services.description: Chemical treatment that reduces frizz and adds a sleek, healthy shine.

services.name: Hair Highlighting
services.description: Adds dimension and depth through customized color placement.

services.name: Hair Styling
services.description: Professional blow-outs or formal updos for special occasions.

services.name: Hair Trimming
services.description: A quick service to maintain health and remove split ends.

categories.name: Nail & Skin Care
categories.description: Luxury treatments focused on grooming and rejuvenating the hands and feet.

services.name: Acrylic Nail Extensions
services.description: Durable and aesthetic extensions, customizable with colors and designs.

services.name: Anti Tan Pedicure
services.description: A relaxing foot treatment that removes tan and dead skin while moisturizing deeply.

services.name: Threading
services.description: Precise eyebrow and facial hair removal to define facial features.

testimonials.name: Priyanka Sharma
testimonials.text: Gul Arora is an absolute magician! He did my bridal makeup and it was flawless. It stayed perfect for over 12 hours. Highly recommend the Airbrush Makeup!

testimonials.name: Rohan Malhotra
testimonials.text: I got my haircut from Akash. He is extremely professional and detail-oriented. The salon's ambiance is clean, relaxing, and very high-end.

testimonials.name: Sunita Chaudhary
testimonials.text: Best salon in Model Town, Panipat! The threading is painless and very precise, and their Anti-Tan Pedicure is incredibly relaxing.

contact.address: Model Town Road, near Sigma Ultrasound, Model Town, Panipat
